creator: greg@gregnet.net
text:
A new port addition.  This is a port of the Glitter Newreader.  It
uses Gnome and automatically downloads binary files from selected groups.

Following is the shar output:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/files
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/files/patch-aa
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-comment
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-plist
#
echo c - /usr/ports/news/glitter
mkdir -p /usr/ports/news/glitter > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - /usr/ports/news/glitter/files
mkdir -p /usr/ports/news/glitter/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/files/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/files/patch-aa << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/files/patch-aa'
X*** src/nntp.c.orig	Sun Mar 26 23:59:55 2000
X--- src/nntp.c		Sat Dec  9 13:21:50 2000
X***************
X*** 16,21 ****
X--- 16,24 ----
X   *
X   */
X  /* nntp.c */
X+ #include <unistd.h>
X+ #include <netinet/in.h>
X+ #include <sys/types.h>
X  #include <sys/stat.h>
X  #include <sys/socket.h>
X  #include <arpa/inet.h>
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/files/patch-aa
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	glitter
X# Date Created:		09 Dec 2000
X# Whom:			Greg Greenaae <greg@gregnet.net>
X#
X# $FreeBSD $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	glitter
XPORTVERSION=	1.0beta1
XCATEGORIES=	news
XMASTER_SITES=	http://mews.org.uk/glitter/\
X		ftp://ftp.gregnet.net/pub/FreeBSD/ports/news/glitter/
X		
XMAINTAINER=	greg@gregnet.net
X
XUSE_X_PREFIX=	yes
XUSE_GTK=	yes
XWANT_GNOME=	yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
X		LIBS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
X
X.if defined(HAVE_GNOME)
XUSE_GNOME=	yes
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/distinfo'
XMD5 (glitter-1.0beta1.tar.gz) = ae0b9d0a9b40899baa935306fb64ce58
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-comment << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-comment'
XA free GTK based binary downloader
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-comment
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-descr'
Xglitter is a free binary downloader *NIX based machines running 
XX11R6 or later.
X
X- Greg Greenaae <greg@gregnet.net>
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-plist'
Xbin/glitter
Xbin/gary
Xshare/gnome/apps/Internet/glitter.desktop
END-of-/usr/ports/news/glitter/pkg-plist
exit
